summary: Comprehensive testing completed for Leopold Mols portfolio website. Backend APIs functioning perfectly (100% success rate). Frontend core functionality working well with navigation, theme switching, and page routing. Minor issues found with some UI selectors and form dropdown interaction.

ui_bugs.issue: Project type dropdown selection timing out with Playwright automation
ui_bugs.note: Form fields are present and functional, but dropdown selection via automation fails

passed_tests: Backend contact form submission with valid data
Backend contact form validation with invalid email (422)
Frontend home page loads with Leopold Mols hero
Frontend highlights section with 6+ skill cards
Frontend navbar with all 5 navigation links
Frontend navigation to Projects page (8 project cards displayed)
Frontend navigation to project detail pages
Frontend About page loads (Qui suis-je heading)
Frontend CV page loads with PDF viewer iframe and download button
Frontend Contact page loads with form and sidebar
Frontend Footer with navigation links and contact info
